MAP 8 — Now Open for Applications

Earn Up To 400% Of Your
Past Income.

SKYS Branch is recruiting experienced financial planners under Manulife's most competitive package yet — MAP 8. Lower targets, bigger rewards, and a 6-year runway to build your practice.

Whether you're an existing FA looking to migrate or a high-income professional exploring a career in financial advisory — this is for you.

Free consultation · No obligation

Why MAP 8

The Most Competitive FA Package
Manulife Has Ever Offered

MAP 8 isn't just an upgrade — it's a complete rebuild. Lower targets, smarter catch-up, and a Year 7 bonus for outperformers.

📉
Competitive

Lower Targets

Target payout ratio reduced from 1–8× APE to just 1–5× APE. NAC targets significantly lowered across all tiers — more achievable, less stressful.

🏆
Competitive

Raise the Ceiling

Max package raised from 300% to 400% for TOT-level performers. New granular tiers (7 vs 4 in MAP 7) mean more precise packages.

⚡
New in MAP 8

Year 7 Bonus Extension

Hit 100% of your NAC target and automatically unlock a Year 7 production bonus. No obligations, pure upside for outperformance.

🔄
Simplified

Auto Catch-Up

Excess production in any year automatically covers shortfalls from prior years. No appeals needed — the system handles it annually.

📋
Simplified

With or Without Production Statement

Both options now offer the same PAI-based package table. No more disadvantage for candidates without MDRT certificates.

💰
Pay for Performance

PPM Now Part of Production Bonus

PPM (Protection Product Mix) is assessed yearly and paid as part of production bonus. Sign-on clawback no longer affected by PPM.

MAP 8 Payout Structure

Know Exactly What You'll Earn

Past Annual Income (PAI)Sign-On BonusProduction BonusTotal Package
Below S$60,00020%80%100%
S$60,000 – S$79,99920%100%120%
S$80,000 – S$119,99950%100%150%
S$120,000 – S$199,99950%150%200%
S$200,000 – S$299,99950%200%250%
S$300,000 – S$399,99950%250%300%
Above S$400,00050%350%400%

*Subject to eligibility criteria. COT required for 200%–250% packages. TOT required for 300%–400% packages. Manulife guidelines apply.

Who Should Apply

Is MAP 8
Right For You?

MAP 8 is designed for ambitious financial planners who want to build a serious practice with the right support and compensation structure.

Existing FAs at other companies looking to migrate with a competitive package
High-income professionals (lawyers, doctors, bankers) exploring FA as a career
MDRTs, COTs, and TOTs looking to maximise earnings under a structured system
Fresh entrants with strong networks and a drive to build a client base

🏢
Backed by Manulife
One of Asia's largest insurance and financial services groups
📈
Structured Growth Path
Clear milestones from FP to leadership with mentorship at every stage
🤝
Team Support

⚖️
MAS Licensed
Full regulatory support and compliance infrastructure provided
